Uses of Package
BusinessLayer

Packages that use BusinessLayer
Package
Description
BusinessLayer
 
UserInterfaceLayer
 
  • Classes in BusinessLayer used by BusinessLayer
    Class
    Description
    Circuit
    Represents a digital circuit with components and connectors.
    Component
    Abstract base class for all circuit components.
    Connector
    Represents a wire connecting two component pins in a circuit.
    Pin
    Represents an input or output pin on a digital component.
    Pin.PinType
    Type of pin: INPUT or OUTPUT.
  • Classes in BusinessLayer used by UserInterfaceLayer
    Class
    Description
    Canvas
    Canvas class represents the drawing area where components and connectors (wires) are placed and interacted with.
    Circuit
    Represents a digital circuit with components and connectors.
    Project
    Represents a digital project consisting of multiple circuits.
